text.title: FinOps OPERATE Phase — Governance and Cost Gates Failure Modes
text.summary: 4 antipatterns from real deployments. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Budget alert fires at 100%; team has no runway to react.
Cost reviews happen at month-end; merge has already created the spend.
antipattern.fix: Wire Infracost into PR pipeline; break build on threshold.

antipattern.symptom: Policy state diverges between accounts; nobody knows which is canonical.
antipattern.fix: Move to OPA / AWS Config / Pulumi Policy with versioned repo.

antipattern.symptom: Team consistently 20% under-budget; idle resources unflagged.
antipattern.fix: Enforce 5% cap (under or over) with post-mortem.
